creator: placej@ctcdist.com
text:
After exiting sysinstall it is leaving the ROM mounted to /dist so that 
nothing else can connect to it (not even sysinstall). This is happening on two 
machines that developed this problem when I started running 2.2.7. It is only 
an annoyance not a serious problem.

Fix: 

Work around: as root type "umount /dist"
I could not find the source for the /stand execs so I haven't looked at it any 
further.
How-To-Repeat: As root run sysinstall go to the package install option and pick CD-ROM for 
the source. Next back out of it by selecting install and confirming that there 
were no packages added. Exit sysinstall. Now go back in to sysinstall and try 
to install a package and when you select CD-ROM as the source you will get an 
error that no ROM can be found.
